values.title: CareFirst Pharmacy Homepage
values.hero_description: CareFirst Pharmacy provides personalized pharmaceutical care, free consultations, and convenient services to help you and your family stay healthy.
values.features_subtitle: More than a pharmacy - we're your partner in health and wellness
values.cta_description: Transferring your prescriptions is easy. Call us or stop by any location and we'll handle everything for you. Experience the CareFirst difference today.

values.title: Prescription Filling & Refills
values.body:
Our experienced pharmacists fill prescriptions quickly and accurately, with most prescriptions ready within 15 minutes. We offer automatic refill reminders via text, email, or phone so you never miss a dose.

Services Include

  • Same-day prescription filling
  • Automatic refill reminders
  • Prescription transfer from other pharmacies
  • 90-day supply options for maintenance medications
  • Medication synchronization (Med Sync) program

Insurance & Pricing

We work with all major insurance providers and offer a competitive discount program for uninsured patients. Our team will help you find the most affordable option for every prescription.

image.alt: Pharmacist filling prescriptions at the counter
image.title: Prescription Filling Services

values.title: Immunizations & Vaccinations
values.body:
Protect yourself and your family with our comprehensive immunization services. Our certified pharmacists can administer a wide range of vaccines without an appointment.

Available Vaccines

  • Annual flu shots (seasonal influenza)
  • COVID-19 vaccines and boosters
  • Shingles (Shingrix)
  • Pneumonia (Prevnar 20, Pneumovax 23)
  • Tdap (tetanus, diphtheria, pertussis)
  • Travel vaccines (Hepatitis A & B, Typhoid)

Walk-Ins Welcome

No appointment necessary for most vaccinations. Simply visit any CareFirst location during business hours. We accept most insurance plans for immunization services.

values.title: Custom Compounding
values.body:
Our state-of-the-art compounding lab allows us to create customized medications when commercially available products don't meet your needs. Our compounding pharmacists work directly with your prescriber to develop the right formulation for you.

Compounding Specialties

  • Hormone replacement therapy (HRT)
  • Dermatological preparations
  • Pediatric formulations (flavored liquids)
  • Pain management creams and gels
  • Veterinary compounding

Quality Assurance

Every compounded medication undergoes rigorous quality testing to ensure potency, purity, and safety. Our lab follows USP 795 and USP 797 standards for non-sterile and sterile compounding.

values.title: Free Prescription Delivery
values.body:
Can't make it to the pharmacy? No problem. CareFirst offers free prescription delivery to your home, office, or anywhere you need it. Our reliable delivery service covers a wide area around each of our locations.

How It Works

  • Call or use our app to request delivery
  • We'll prepare your prescriptions
  • Delivery within the same business day (orders by 2 PM)
  • Contactless delivery options available
  • Signature required for controlled substances

Delivery Area

We deliver within a 15-mile radius of each CareFirst location. For addresses outside our delivery area, we offer convenient mail-order options with free shipping on orders over $25.

values.title: 5 Essential Medication Safety Tips
values.body:
Taking medications correctly is crucial for your health. Here are five essential tips to ensure you're getting the most benefit from your medications while staying safe.

1. Read the Label Carefully

Always read the prescription label and any accompanying patient information. Pay attention to dosage instructions, timing, and whether to take with food.

2. Keep a Medication List

Maintain an up-to-date list of all medications you take, including over-the-counter drugs and supplements. Share this list with all your healthcare providers.

3. Don't Skip Doses

Take your medications exactly as prescribed. If you miss a dose, don't double up. Check with your pharmacist about what to do if you miss a dose of your specific medication.

4. Store Properly

Store medications according to the label instructions. Most should be kept in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Some require refrigeration.

5. Ask Your Pharmacist

Your CareFirst pharmacist is always available to answer questions about your medications, potential interactions, and side effects. Don't hesitate to ask!

image.alt: Organized prescription medications on a table
image.title: Medication Safety Tips

values.title: Your Complete Guide to Flu Prevention
values.body:
Flu season doesn't have to mean getting sick. With the right precautions, you can significantly reduce your risk of catching influenza and protect those around you.

Get Vaccinated

The single most effective way to prevent the flu is annual vaccination. The CDC recommends everyone 6 months and older get a flu vaccine each year. CareFirst offers walk-in flu shots at all locations.

Practice Good Hygiene

Wash your hands frequently with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. Use hand sanitizer when soap isn't available. Avoid touching your face, especially your eyes, nose, and mouth.

Boost Your Immune System

Support your body's natural defenses with adequate sleep (7-9 hours), regular exercise, a balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables, and stress management techniques.

When to See a Doctor

If you develop flu symptoms (fever, body aches, cough, fatigue), contact your healthcare provider early. Antiviral medications are most effective when started within 48 hours of symptom onset.

image.alt: Doctor administering flu vaccine to patient
image.title: Flu Prevention Guide

values.title: Understanding Vitamins and Supplements
values.body:
With so many vitamins and supplements available, it can be overwhelming to know what you actually need. This guide will help you make informed decisions about supplementation.

Essential Vitamins

Most people can get the nutrients they need from a balanced diet. However, certain groups may benefit from supplementation, including pregnant women, older adults, and those with specific deficiencies.

Common Supplements

  • Vitamin D - Important for bone health and immune function, especially in northern climates
  • Vitamin B12 - Essential for nerve function, particularly important for vegetarians
  • Iron - Critical for oxygen transport, common deficiency in women
  • Omega-3 Fatty Acids - Supports heart and brain health
  • Probiotics - Promotes digestive health and immune function

Talk to Your Pharmacist

Before starting any supplement, consult with your CareFirst pharmacist. We can review your medications for potential interactions and help you choose quality products.

values.title: Managing Diabetes: Tips from Your Pharmacist
values.body:
Living with diabetes requires daily attention to medication, diet, and lifestyle. Your CareFirst pharmacist is an essential part of your diabetes care team.

Medication Management

Take your diabetes medications exactly as prescribed. If you use insulin, proper storage and injection technique are critical. Our pharmacists can review your technique and answer any questions.

Blood Sugar Monitoring

Regular blood sugar monitoring helps you understand how food, activity, and medications affect your levels. We carry a full range of glucose monitors and testing supplies at competitive prices.

Healthy Lifestyle Habits

  • Eat regular, balanced meals with consistent carbohydrate intake
  • Stay physically active with at least 150 minutes of moderate exercise per week
  • Monitor your feet daily for cuts, blisters, or changes
  • Keep all medical appointments and lab tests
  • Know your A1C goal and check it every 3-6 months

CareFirst Diabetes Care Program

Ask about our diabetes management program, which includes free blood pressure checks, medication therapy management, and educational resources.

values.title: CareFirst Downtown
values.body:
Our flagship downtown location offers the full range of CareFirst pharmacy services in the heart of the city. Conveniently located near public transit, with ample parking available in the adjacent garage.

This location features our largest compounding lab and a private consultation room for confidential medication reviews. We also offer drive-through prescription pickup for your convenience.

values.title: CareFirst Westside
values.body:
Located in the Westside Medical Center complex, our Westside location provides seamless coordination with nearby physicians and specialists. Easy access for patients coming from medical appointments.

This location specializes in specialty medications and offers a dedicated immunization clinic with extended hours during flu season.

values.title: CareFirst North Park
values.body:
Our newest location in the North Park Shopping Center brings CareFirst's trusted services to the growing north side community. Features modern amenities and a family-friendly environment.

This location offers a kids' corner, a wellness products section with organic and natural health products, and a blood pressure monitoring station open to all community members.

image.alt: CareFirst North Park modern pharmacy interior
image.title: CareFirst North Park Location

values.title: About CareFirst Pharmacy
values.body:
CareFirst Pharmacy has been serving our community since 1998, founded on the belief that every patient deserves personalized, compassionate pharmaceutical care.

Our Mission

To provide exceptional pharmacy services that improve the health and well-being of every patient we serve. We go beyond filling prescriptions - we build relationships and become a trusted part of your healthcare team.

Our Team

Our team of licensed pharmacists and certified technicians brings decades of combined experience to your care. Every team member is committed to ongoing education and training to stay current with the latest pharmaceutical advances.

Community Involvement

We believe in giving back to the community that has supported us for over 25 years. CareFirst regularly sponsors health fairs, provides free medication disposal events, and partners with local schools for health education programs.

values.title: Privacy Policy
values.body:
At CareFirst Pharmacy, protecting your personal and health information is a top priority. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.

Information We Collect

We collect information necessary to provide pharmacy services, including your name, date of birth, contact information, insurance details, medical history, and prescription records.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used to fill prescriptions, process insurance claims, provide medication counseling, and send refill reminders. We never sell your personal information to third parties.

HIPAA Compliance

CareFirst Pharmacy fully complies with the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA). We maintain strict policies and procedures to protect the confidentiality of your protected health information (PHI).

Your Rights

You have the right to access your health records, request corrections, and restrict certain uses of your information. Contact our privacy officer at privacy@carefirstrx.com or call (555) 100-2000 for more information.
